# AI Unfiltered - Full Article List

> This file contains recent AI news articles for consumption by LLMs and AI agents.
> Updated every 4 hours. Links to original sources.


## 2026-07-11

### logicalqubit Launches Quantum Cloud for All Industries, as First Quantum Computing Companies Begin Harvesting
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/logibit-quantum-cloud-platform-industry-jul2026
- Summary: Hangzhou-based logicalqubit releases its quantum cloud platform with both physical and logical qubit capabilities, marking a shift from hardware sales to cloud-based quantum computing services.

### MiniMax Takes the Beating for the Entire AI Industry: Lock-Up Crash, Then $2.2B Fundraise in 48 Hours
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/minimax-lockup-crash-fundraise-ai-market-jul2026
- Summary: MiniMax shares plunged 24% on lock-up expiry then raised $2.2 billion HKD in hours, revealing a fundamental split in how markets value AI platform companies versus AI product companies.

### Shanghai Low-Altitude Unicorn Volant Aerotech Secures $66 Billion in Orders for eVTOL Aircraft
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/volant-aerotech-evtol-orders-billion-jul2026
- Summary: Shanghai-based Volant Aerotech has secured over 1,900 orders worth $66 billion for its VE25-100 eVTOL, completed China first manned transition flight, and restructured for IPO.

### China Enters the Reusable Rocket Era: What Makes the World-First Net Recovery System Tick
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/china-net-recovery-reusable-rocket-mechanism-jul2026
- Summary: China Long March 10B world-first sea-based net recovery system eliminates landing legs for higher payload and reliability, using a 144m recovery ship with 0.5m positioning accuracy.

### AI Data Center Power Consumption Surges: Solid-State Transformers Become Inevitable as Sungrow Enters 800V DC Architecture
- Source: Pandaily
- Category: chinese-ai
- URL: https://pandaily.com/sungrow-solid-state-transformer-ai-data-center-power-jul2026
- Summary: Sungrow launches commercial solid-state transformers for AI data centers, using 800V DC architecture to cut power distribution footprint by 50% and achieve 98.5% peak efficiency.
